languages.text: "Делаете вид, что мои упреки вас не касаются, {name}? Слабая позиция. Разговор становится бессмысленным, поскольку вы упрямо не желаете видеть реальное положение дел и потакаете своим иллюзиям. Что же, вернемся к этой беседе позже... в более приличествующей обстановке".

"Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."
languages.original_text: "Делаете вид, что мои упреки вас не касаются, {name}? Слабая позиция. Разговор становится бессмысленным, поскольку вы упрямо не желаете видеть реальное положение дел и потакаете своим иллюзиям. Что же, вернемся к этой беседе позже... в более приличествующей обстановке".

traits.locale_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and indulge your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

"Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

"Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

languages.text: «¿Acaso finge que mis reproches no le preocupan, {name}? Una actitud débil. Esta conversación carece de sentido si su testarudez le impide apreciar cómo están las cosas y en vez de eso prefiere dejarse llevar por sus propios delirios. Muy bien, ya retomaremos esta discusión luego, en un entorno más apropiado».
languages.original_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

traits.locale_text: «¿Acaso finge que mis reproches no le preocupan, {name}? Una actitud débil. Esta conversación carece de sentido si su testarudez le impide apreciar cómo están las cosas y en vez de eso prefiere dejarse llevar por sus propios delirios. Muy bien, ya retomaremos esta discusión luego, en un entorno más apropiado».

languages.text: “你是打算假装我的指责与你无关吗，{name}？真是软弱的做法。既然你固执地不肯认清现实，一味沉溺于自己的幻想，那么这场对话已毫无意义。也罢，我们日后再另寻时机继续谈吧。”
languages.original_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

traits.locale_text: “你是打算假装我的指责与你无关吗，{name}？真是软弱的做法。既然你固执地不肯认清现实，一味沉溺于自己的幻想，那么这场对话已毫无意义。也罢，我们日后再另寻时机继续谈吧。”

languages.text: « Oseriez-vous prétendre que mes reproches ne vous concernent pas, {name} ? Voilà qui ne plaide pas en votre faveur. Cette conversation n'a plus de sens, car vous refusez obstinément de voir la réalité en face et préférez vous complaire dans vos propres illusions. Puisque c'est ainsi, nous y reviendrons plus tard, dans un cadre plus propice. »
languages.original_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

traits.locale_text: « Oseriez-vous prétendre que mes reproches ne vous concernent pas, {name} ? Voilà qui ne plaide pas en votre faveur. Cette conversation n'a plus de sens, car vous refusez obstinément de voir la réalité en face et préférez vous complaire dans vos propres illusions. Puisque c'est ainsi, nous y reviendrons plus tard, dans un cadre plus propice. »

languages.text: "Sitemlerim seni alakadar etmiyormuş gibi mi davranıyorsun {name}? Zayıf bir duruş. İşlerin gerçek durumunu görmeyi inatla reddettiğin ve kendi yanılsamalarına daldığın için bu konuşma anlamsızlaşıyor. Pekâlâ, bu konuya daha sonra daha uygun bir ortamda geri dönelim."
languages.original_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

traits.locale_text: "Sitemlerim seni alakadar etmiyormuş gibi mi davranıyorsun {name}? Zayıf bir duruş. İşlerin gerçek durumunu görmeyi inatla reddettiğin ve kendi yanılsamalarına daldığın için bu konuşma anlamsızlaşıyor. Pekâlâ, bu konuya daha sonra daha uygun bir ortamda geri dönelim."

languages.text: 「私の非難があなたに関わるものだと装うのですか、{name}？ 弱腰な姿勢です。あなたは真実を頑なに見ようとせず、自分の幻影に溺れているため、この会話は意味をなさない。それでは、この議論は別の機会に、より適切な場所で再開しましょう。」
languages.original_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and instead indulge merely your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."

traits.locale_text: 「私の非難があなたに関わるものだと装うのですか、{name}？ 弱腰な姿勢です。あなたは真実を頑なに見ようとせず、自分の幻影に溺れているため、この会話は意味をなさない。それでは、この議論は別の機会に、より適切な場所で再開しましょう。」

languages.text: "Wollt Ihr behaupten, meine Vorwürfe interessieren Euch nicht, {name}? Schwach. Diese Unterhaltung verliert ihre Bedeutung, da Ihr Euch beharrlich weigert, die Lage zu erkennen und Euch weiter Euren Illusionen hingebt. Aber gut, lasst uns das später besprechen, in einer passenderen Umgebung."
languages.original_text: "Do you pretend that my reproaches do not concern you, {name}? A feeble stance. This conversation becomes meaningless, as you stubbornly refuse to see the true state of affairs and indulge your own illusions. Very well, let us return to this discussion later, in a more suitable setting."
